## Tool

Name, vendor, public URL.

## Access Method

- [ ] Public API
- [ ] CLI
- [ ] IDE plugin
- [ ] Web UI only (requires manual collection)

## AI-Involvement Spectrum Position

(See METHODOLOGY §12)

- [ ] 1 - Suggestive
- [ ] 2 - Augmentative
- [ ] 3 - Conversational
- [ ] 4 - Agentic
- [ ] 5 - End-to-end
- [ ] 6 - Composed

## Tool Configuration

What configuration should be used for benchmarking? (Default vs vendor-preferred?)

## Submission

If you're submitting an adapter implementation, please link the PR here.
